metadata.name: Mind Stone — cast, tap for {C}, sacrifice to draw
metadata.description: p1 casts Mind Stone ({2}), taps it for {C} mana, then sacrifices it to draw a card. Tests Mind Stone's two modes: mana ability and card draw via sacrifice.
metadata.generation_notes: Mind Stone oracle: '{T}: Add {C}.' and '{1}, {T}, Sacrifice Mind Stone: Draw a card.' Step 1: cast Mind Stone for {2}. Step 2: tap it for {C} (mana ability, no stack). Step 3: pay {1}, tap it (already tapped from step 2, but the activation cost taps it as part of the cost — note that tapping an already-tapped permanent is illegal; the second activation requires Mind Stone to be untapped). Actually for this script, we split the actions: first cast Mind Stone (resolves to battlefield), then in a later turn or after untap, sacrifice it. Let's simplify: cast it turn 1, and in the script show: cast → resolve → tap for mana (in a later step after untap implied). Actually the simplest version: just show cast + resolve + sacrifice draw. The mana ability tap can be in a separate earlier step.

script.step_note: p1 activates Mind Stone's second ability: pay {1}, tap, sacrifice to draw a card.

actions.note: p1 pays {1}, taps Mind Stone, and sacrifices it. Activated ability goes on the stack.

actions.description: Mind Stone sacrificed, ability on stack
actions.note: Mind Stone sacrificed as cost; ability on stack.
Both pass — Mind Stone ability resolves.
Mind Stone ability resolves: p1 draws 1.

actions.description: After Mind Stone sacrifice: p1 has 1 card in hand, Mind Stone in graveyard
actions.note: Mind Stone in graveyard. p1 drew 1 card.
